summary: Mapped all 8 infrastructure systems required for the Review Compression System (IN-002). Found the existing plan, diff, validation, historian, checkpoint, claims, red-team, and governance landscape. Identified 10 concrete gaps, 7 smoking guns, and 4 missing schemas that must be addressed before review compression can be built.

critical_gaps: GAP-001: No automated plan/diff comparison exists — critic reviews do this manually
GAP-005: No review_weight / risk_score / change_weight metrics — core requirement is greenfield
GAP-007: No review manifest format or schema exists at all
GAP-002: claim_atoms are free-text strings, not structured file references

key_data_sources.plan_artifacts: docs/json/opencode/plans/{id}.v1.json — 90+ plan files, envelope schema with claim_atoms
key_data_sources.structured_diffs: Snapshot.FileDiff[] via snapshot/index.ts diffFull() — per-file additions/deletions/status/patch
key_data_sources.validation_records: 5+ formats across validation/, qa/, stress/, waves/ directories — no common schema

recommended_sequence: Phase 1: Create 4 missing governance schemas (builder_publication_record, verification_record, prepublication_review_cycle, review_manifest)
Phase 2: Build plan/diff comparison engine — reads plan boundary + claim_atoms, parses Snapshot.FileDiff[], produces deviation report
Phase 3: Design review weight rubric — classify changes by type, path, dependency impact
Phase 4: Build manifest generator — Effect service that reads all data sources and produces review_manifest output
claim_atoms: C1: Plan artifacts use envelope schema with claim_atoms as free-text strings — no structured file references
C2: Structured diffs exist via Snapshot.FileDiff[] and Vcs.FileDiff[] — per-file additions/deletions/status/patch available
C3: Five validation schema families coexist with zero unification and no JSON Schema files
C4: Three governance schemas required by AGENTS.md do not exist as schema files
C5: No automated plan/diff comparison, test delta tracking, or review weight metrics exist in the codebase
C6: Prepublication verdict fabrication is possible — documented governance integrity gap
C7: Key data sources for review compression exist but are fragmented across multiple directory structures
